thoughts.subject: Executing the Command
thoughts.description: I've determined that the primary action needed is executing the shell command "echo hello." My current plan involves using the `run_shell_command` tool. There are still some nuances to work out regarding the tool's use. It looks as though I'll need to remember to reply with "done."

thoughts.subject: Clarifying Tool Usage
thoughts.description: I'm now questioning whether the "update_topic" tool applies here. The prompt explicitly excludes it for simple tasks. Although I was going to call the `run_shell_command` tool, it seems I should not call `update_topic` due to the exception rule. The single tool call of "echo hello" doesn't warrant an `update_topic` call. This task is more of an isolated lookup task.
